\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4618 introduces Field Strength Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{F}_{e}(x, t) := \frac{\partial \Psi}{\partial t} + \nabla \cdot \Omega \]
